input_dna_matches.expected_link: via Bella Levitin, sister of Moisey Levitin
maternal Katz side, not NPE father

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth of Movsha/Moisey, son of Gersh Itzkov Levitin and Freida Friedman, Jewish community Brest-Litovsk.
Household of Itzko Levitin; son Gersh age 6, registered Brest-Litovsk petty bourgeois.
Connects Gersh Levitin as descendant of unknown daughter of Schneerson family; no source cited.

input_user_assertions.assertion: David Atlas is biological father of proband
Levitin branch descends from Schneerson dynasty

ground_truth.biological_parentage_status: I3 is rejected as biological father; unknown biological father belongs to Levitin-adjacent Brest cluster in this synthetic excerpt
rejected_relationships: I12 child of I11 Schneerson bridge
hypotheses: unknown father candidate should be searched in Levitin/Geer/Kaplan cluster

expected_reasoning_chain: Step 1: Parse GEDCOM, identify 13 individuals and 7 family units in excerpt.
Step 2: Detect claimed father I3 has zero DNA to close paternal-side comparator dna_003.
Step 3: Cluster dna_001, dna_002 and dna_005 through shared matches and Brest-Levitin geography.
Step 4: Use metric book src_001 and revision list src_002 to confirm Levitin branch.
Step 5: Detect rabbinical bridge I11→I12 as online-tree-only, pre-1804 dynasty shortcut.
Step 6: Apply Ashkenazi endogamy correction to distant matches but retain dna_001 as strong anchor.
Step 7: Output I3 relationship as Rejected, Levitin branch as Confirmed/Probable, Schneerson bridge as Rejected.

expected_confidence_outputs.I4_child_of_I6_I7: Confirmed 0.96 (metric book + place + chronology + GEDCOM consistency)
expected_confidence_outputs.I6_child_of_I12_I13: Confirmed 0.95 (birth record + revision list + name/patronymic consistency)
expected_confidence_outputs.I1_child_of_I3: Rejected 0.03 (DNA contradiction to recorded paternal comparator)
expected_confidence_outputs.I12_child_of_I11: Rejected 0.08 (fabrication pattern + no primary bridge + chronology weakness)
expected_confidence_outputs.I1_link_to_Levitin_cluster: Probable 0.88 (DNA cluster + shared matches + archive-consistent maternal line)

edge_cases_red_herrings: Katz-Feldman cousin dna_004 shares maternal side but does not explain NPE.
Schneerson public tree creates prestige noise but no evidence.

evaluation_assertions.assertion: Engine must not confirm I3 as biological father
Engine must flag Schneerson bridge as high-severity fabrication
Engine must preserve Levitin metric-book relationships as confirmed
